Variables.Name: SoundClassObject
Variables.Description: Sound class this sound belongs to

Variables.Name: bDebug
Variables.Description: When "stat sounds -debug" has been specified, draw this sound's attenuation shape when the sound is audible. For debugging purpose only.

Variables.Name: bOverrideConcurrency
Variables.Description: Whether or not to override the sound concurrency object with local concurrency settings.

Variables.Name: bOutputToBusOnly
Variables.Description: Whether or not to only send this audio's output to a bus. If true, will not be this sound won't be audible except through bus sends.

Variables.Name: SoundConcurrencySettings
Variables.Description: If Override Concurrency is false, the sound concurrency settings to use for this sound.

Variables.Name: ConcurrencyOverrides
Variables.Description: If Override Concurrency is true, concurrency settings to use.

Variables.Name: MaxConcurrentPlayCount_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Maximum number of times this sound can be played concurrently.

Variables.Name: AttenuationSettings
Variables.Description: Attenuation settings package for the sound

Variables.Name: Priority
Variables.Description: Sound priority (higher value is higher priority) used for concurrency resolution. This priority value is weighted against the final volume of the sound.

Variables.Name: SoundSubmixObject
Variables.Description:
Sound submix this sound belongs to. 
	   Audio will play here and traverse through the submix graph. 
	   A null entry will make the sound obey the default master effects graph.

Variables.Name: SoundSubmixSends
Variables.Description: An array of submix sends. Audio from this sound will send a portion of its audio to these effects.

Variables.Name: SourceEffectChain
Variables.Description: The source effect chain to use for this sound.

Variables.Name: BusSends
Variables.Description: This sound will send it's audio output to this list of buses if there are bus instances playing.
